title: クレーンゲーム大成功！

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Yaaay! ☆ Look at all these Cuties! Thanks a lot,
Trainer! I'm so happy! ♪

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Oh, but... I wonder if this much combined
cuteness might end up overshadowing me...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Nrgh... Time to call on my Umadol powers! Here I
go! Happy face! ☆ Shy face! ♪ Sad face!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
An Umadol can't always be smiling. Sometimes we
have to be sad! ☆ The contrast is part of the
charm!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
There's no way I'm losing to some plushies! ♪
Time to get emoting with an expression relay! ☆
